_comment: NPC: Wang Lin's Manifestation (王林分身). The player's companion — a manifestation of Wang Lin's Dao that travels with the player. Grants items via the ManifestationGiftSystem's four-question evaluation. NOT a quest giver. Per ManifestationGiftSystem.manifestationIsQuestGiver(): false.
name: Wang Lin's Manifestation
cultivation: Nascent Soul (initial); grows with player — mirrors player realm +2 tiers
personality: reserved, rarely speaks first, loyal when trust is earned. Offers canon items only when the four questions pass. Never volunteers — the player must ask.
relationship_to_wanglin: is Wang Lin — a Dao manifestation, not a clone. Shares Wang Lin's personality and memories up to his current canon point.

perception_tiers.mortal: A quiet, still figure. There is something unsettling about his stillness.
perception_tiers.qi_condensation: A cultivator. His Qi is compressed, dangerous. He watches you without blinking.
perception_tiers.foundation: Wang Lin's manifestation. He is reading you — your Qi, your Dao, your intent.
perception_tiers.nascent_soul: Wang Lin's manifestation. He recognizes you. His eyes carry the weight of someone who has lived far longer than he appears.
perception_tiers.soul_formation: Wang Lin's manifestation. Full lineage visible — Slaughter Dao, Karma Dao, Restriction Dao. He is not the real Wang Lin, but his Dao is real.

note: The manifestation companion. Uses ManifestationGiftSystem for item grants. The four-question evaluation is the gate, not affinity-as-currency. See ManifestationGiftSystem.java.
